brand_identity.name: EduQuest
brand_identity.emotional_tone: Friendly, approachable, safe, yet organized and academic.

headings.usage: All section headers, page titles, and modal titles.

monospace.usage: Code snippets (if any), IDs, technical data.

primary.name: Pacific Blue
primary.usage: Main buttons, active states, key brand elements. A deep, trustworthy blue that isn't corporate navy.

secondary.name: Genius Yellow
secondary.usage: Highlights, 'New' badges, accents, interactive triggers. Adds warmth and energy.

success.name: Growth Teal
success.usage: Success states, completed chapters, positive progress.

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards instead of p-4.

student_dashboard.card_style: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 border-b-4 border-transparent hover:border-primary

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-all hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-300 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white

cards.class_card: flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center space-y-4 aspect-[4/3] group cursor-pointer relative overflow-hidden
cards.subject_card: flex flex-row items-center p-6 space-x-4 hover:bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100

modals.overlay: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm p-4
modals.content: bg-white rounded-2xl w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto p-0 relative shadow-2xl animate-in zoom-in-95 fade-in duration-200
modals.close_button: absolute top-4 right-4 z-10 p-2 bg-white/80 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-full text-slate-500 hover:text-red-500 transition-colors

visual_enhancers.patterns: Subtle dot pattern or graph paper grid in background of dashboard (opacity 0.4).
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Buttons bounce slightly on click. Cards lift on hover. Page transitions use subtle fade-up.
visual_enhancers.illustrations: Use 3D-style icons or flat vector illustrations. Avoid generic corporate Memphis style.

hero_students.description: Happy diverse students taking a selfie, used for login or landing.

science_lab.description: Children in lab coats conducting experiment, used for Science subject card.

math_abstract.description: Abstract multicolored cube, used for Mathematics subject card.

study_group.description: Group around table, used for Dashboard or About section.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA (4.5:1).
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (ring-2 ring-primary/50).

anti_ai_rules: Do not use generic AI emojis (🤖, 🚀) as primary icons.
interaction: All buttons must have a hover and active state.
Inputs must have clear error states (border-red-500).
Modals must close on Escape key or backdrop click.
universal_guidelines.data_testid: Every interactive element (button, link, input) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'login-submit-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install 'nunito' and 'manrope' from Google Fonts via @import in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use filled variations for active states if available.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use 'recharts' with the custom color palette defined above.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout: For the Dashboard, use the 'Bento Grid' strategy. For the Admin Panel, use the 'High Density Grid' strategy.
